name: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans, Inc.
description_short: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans offers title loans up to $15,000 and installment loans up to $1,500 with quick online applications and same-day funding at their Milwaukee location.
description_long:
Wisconsin Auto Title Loans, Inc. operates a storefront location at 6863-65 North 76th Street in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, serving as part of a larger title loan network. The company specializes in providing fast cash solutions for consumers facing unexpected financial emergencies through collateral-based lending products. Their Milwaukee branch maintains regular business hours (Monday-Friday 10AM-6PM, Saturday 9AM-1PM) to serve local customers seeking immediate funding.

The company offers three primary loan products: title loans up to $15,000 secured by vehicle collateral, online title loans for digital applicants, and signature installment loans up to $1,500. All loan types feature a quick and easy online application process requiring basic vehicle and personal information. The application emphasizes speed and accessibility, allowing customers to apply from home or visit the physical location for in-person assistance. The company accepts electronic delivery of all disclosures and loan documents, streamlining the approval process.

Wisconsin Auto Title Loans distinguishes itself through multiple application channels—both physical storefront and online options—giving consumers flexibility in how they apply. The company provides transparent disclosure requirements, including detailed terms, rates, fees, and a FAQ section addressing common questions about their title loan and installment loan products. Their website includes a dedicated "Make A Payment" section for existing customers and maintains clear information about required documentation and the loan process.

As a title loan lender, the company operates in the high-cost lending space typical of emergency cash products. While they offer genuine speed and accessibility for consumers with poor credit or urgent needs, borrowers should carefully review the rates and terms disclosed on their website before committing. The $15,000 title loan maximum and $1,500 installment loan cap serve consumers needing smaller emergency amounts rather than substantial financing.
pros: Offers title loans up to $15,000—higher maximum than typical payday loans
Multiple application channels including online application and physical storefront location
Same-day or next-day funding available for emergency cash needs
Clear FAQ sections specific to title loans and installment loans to set expectations
Maintains transparent disclosure pages including rates, fees, and terms
Signature installment loans available as alternative to title-based products
Regular business hours (10AM-6PM weekdays, 9AM-1PM Saturday) for walk-in service
cons: Title loans are high-cost products with rates and fees not fully disclosed on main page—requires navigation to separate disclosure section
Installment loans capped at only $1,500, limiting usefulness for larger emergencies
Requires vehicle title as collateral for primary product, creating repossession risk if borrower defaults
Electronic consent and e-signature process may exclude consumers without reliable internet or email access
Limited information about credit requirements or qualification criteria on public website
best_for: Vehicle owners with urgent financial needs who can use their car title as collateral
Consumers with poor credit or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional personal loans
Those seeking smaller emergency amounts ($1,500-$15,000) with fast turnaround
Milwaukee-area residents who prefer the option of in-person service at a physical location
diagnosis: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans is best for Milwaukee vehicle owners facing urgent cash needs who have poor or no credit history and can accept high-cost borrowing terms. The main caveat is that title loans carry significant repossession risk if payments are missed, and the actual APR and fees—typical of the title loan industry—should be fully reviewed before applying.
services: Online title loans with digital application
Online account management and payment portal
FAQ resources for title loans and installment loans
Vehicle valuation for title loan amounts
Customer service via phone (414-353-1628) and email
Rates, fees, and terms disclosure documentation
meta_description: Wisconsin Auto Title Loans offers title loans up to $15,000 and installment loans up to $1,500 with quick approval and same-day funding in Milwaukee.
